raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Atalija to Lau-
schu Kleegschann dsirdeja / kas
attezzeja un to Kehnizu teize /
tad nahze ta pee teem Laudim
ta KUNGA Namma /
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta usluhkoja/ un rau-
gi/ tas Kehnisch stabiweja pee
fawa Pihlara pee tahs ee-eija-
mas Weetas/ un tee Leeli-Kun-
gi un Trummeterxi bija pee ta
Kehnina/ un wiſſi Laudis tahs
Semmes preezajahs/un puhte ar
Trummnetehin/ un tee Dseedata-
ji ar spehlejameem Rihkeem lab-
bi finnadami flaweht. Tad fa-
plohsfija Atalija fawas Drehbes/
un fazzija: Dumpis/ Dumpis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Preesteris Joja-
dus iswaddija tohs Kapteines /
kas pahr to Karra-Spehku bija
eezelti/ un fazzija us teem: Jo-
weddeet to us Ahra-Puffi ta
Naimna/ un kas winnai pakak-
ees / tam buhs ar Sohbinu no-
kautam tapt. Jo tas Preesteris
fazzija/ jums ne buhs winnu ta
KUNGA Namma nokaut.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee peelikke Rohkas
pee tahs/ un kad ta pee tahs ee-
eijamas Weetas pee Sirgn-
Wahrtim nahze/ pee ta Kehnina
Namna / tad nokawe tee to
turpatt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jojadus darrija wee-
n Derribu starp sewi/ un starp
wiſſem Laudim/ un starp to
Kehnizu/ ka tee ta KUNGA
Laudis buhtu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz gahje wiſſi Lau-
Baalã Namma/ un nolausija
un winna Altarus/ un fada
ja winna Bildeß/ un nok-
Matanu Baala Preesteri pree-
teem Altareem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jojadus istaitija
kat tohs Amattus pee ta Ku-
GA Namma zaur teem Pe-
sterem / kas Lewitt bija /
Dahwidß bij atschfibris
KUNGA Namma/ tam Ku-
GAM Dedfamo Uppurus
pureht/ ittin ka Mohsus Be-
libã rakſtihts irr/ ar Preek-
ar Dseedmahm / pehz Dah-
Liſchannu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winsch eezehle Wah-
Surgus pee ta KUNGAN
ma Wahrtim/ ka ne kas/
jebkahdas Leetas deht neschk-
buhtu/ tur ee-eetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſch rehme
Kapteines/ un tohs Warre-
un Walditajus starp teem
Dim/ ir wiſſus Laudis tas E-
mes/ un nowedde to Keh-
no ta KUNGA Namma
nahze zaur tahm angst
Wahrtim Kehnina Namma
fehdinaja to Kehnizu us to D-
stibas Krebslu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Laudis
Semmes preezajahs / un
Pilsfabts norimme/ pehz to-
tee Ataliju bij ar Sohbinu
kawuschi.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
